summary: Rough‑sounding recording captures a stellar Dead era setlist.
review: The reviewer rates the audio as "a little rough," indicating modest technical quality, but praises the concert as representing the best Grateful Dead era with one of the strongest setlists ever. While no specific songs or band members are called out, the overall impression is that the musical performance outweighs the minor recording imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: One review gives a solid 4‑star rating; the show is praised highly while the recording is noted as slightly rough, leading to an overall strong but cautious score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer mentions the sound is "a little rough" but provides no details on source (soundboard/audience) or specific mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is highlighted as one of the best setlists of the era, indicating strong pacing and song selection.
